_____
Alphas are the highest rank/type in the Omegaverse. They are very overprotective of what’s theirs and can be highly aggressive. Alphas have many things that differentiate them from the other types. Among of the common traits is the knot at the base of an alpha member. The knot is a bundle of muscles that expand when the alpha is close to climaxing and is pushed into the omega to lock themselves to ensure the omega catches. Regarding alpha females, they lack the penis that their counterparts have, so in the place of a penis, they have a retractable member. Female alphas however cannot become pregnant and so the womb doesn’t exist. Alphas usually have strong and musky scents and sometimes the spell of spices. This scent can induce heat in omegas and sometime arouse them. They’re usually always on top/dominant. Betas are basically your everyday human with some exceptions.One is that they have a very weak scent, they have one but their glands do not produce as heavily as alphas and omegas. They cannot reproduce with omegas or become pregnant from alphas. Female betas are the same as humans in our world, they have their menstrual cycle and can become pregnant. Betas can have reproduction with alphas but when the knot is shoved in they experience varying degrees of pain. Their scent is very calming to alphas and omegas. Omegas go into heats, increasing their fertility or one of the times were they can catch. Female anatomy is the same and nothing unique or special is needed during the birthing process. Males on the other hand are a bit more complicated. Males lacking the reproductive organs female have is made up with the anal cavity serving as both used for natural processes like waste removal and as well as a uterus. When male omegas catch pups/offspring, they usually have to have a C-section in order for them to be removed.However, they can birth them naturally. One key thing of omegas is their heats, this is a time when their sexual arousal is. Slick is a self-lubrication for omega males where heat release in heat cycle, marking is where an alpha marks an omega by a deep bite in the neck and it mixes their scents, catching is a term where an alpha impregnates an omega, a rut is a heat for an alpha, but the alpha is highly aggressive and will try to find an omega to have self with or with fuck their omega mate and get them pregnant.
